bird.name: Yellow-breasted antpitta
bird.summary: The yellow-breasted antpitta (Grallaria flavotincta) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador.

locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

relations.evidence: It is found in Colombia and Ecuador

relations.subject: Yellow-breasted antpitta
relations.evidence: It is found in Colombia and Ecuador

relations.subject: Yellow-breasted antpitta
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits the interior understory of humid montane forest, where it favors steep slopes and areas along watercourses in ravines
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Yellow-breasted antpitta
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "No human effects on Yellow-breasted Antpitta have been specifically documented, but given this species apparent preference for intact forest, logging and other habitat-altering activities undoubtedly have an effect." It is uncommon and known only locally in Ecuador where it might best be assessed as Vulnerable
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
